goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'eritrean' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'leave after 08:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve eritrean food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to london kings cross and should leave after 08:15
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
